nodes.name: DEFAULT
nodes.description: Inherits the degrees of freedom from the project settings.

nodes.name: SIX_DOF
nodes.description: Specifies which axis to freeze rotation and movement along.

nodes.name: YZ_PLANE
nodes.description: Allows 2D movement along the Y-Z plane.

nodes.name: XZ_PLANE
nodes.description: Allows 2D movement along the X-Z plane.

nodes.name: XY_PLANE
nodes.description: Allows 2D movement along the X-Y plane.

nodes.name: CUSTOM_PLANE
nodes.description: Allows 2D movement along the plane of a given normal

nodes.name: RigUnit_GetBoolAnimationChannelFromItem
nodes.description: Get Bool Channel is used to retrieve a control's animation channel value

nodes.name: initial
nodes.description: If set to true the initial value will be returned

nodes.name: value
nodes.description: The current value of the animation channel

nodes.name: BOTH
nodes.description: Will scale the content up or down.

nodes.name: DOWN_ONLY
nodes.description: Will only make the content smaller, will never scale it larger than the content's desired size.

nodes.name: UP_ONLY
nodes.description: Will only make the content larger, will never scale it smaller than the content's desired size.

nodes.name: star_map_intensity
nodes.description: Overall brightness of the Star Map.

nodes.name: star_map_color_tint
nodes.description: Overall color tint of the Star Map.

nodes.name: star_map_horizon_threshold
nodes.description: Indicates how strong the star map can be faded into horizon. Lower values cause more stars appear at horizon.

nodes.name: star_map_atmosphere_threshold
nodes.description: Indicates how strong the star map can be faded into atmosphere. Lower values cause more stars appear at brighter points in atmosphere, e.g. at daytime.

nodes.name: alpha
nodes.description: The float value that controls the alpha blending when the alpha input type is set to 'Float'

nodes.name: alpha_input_type
nodes.description: The data type used to control the alpha blending between the A and B poses. Note: Changing this value will disconnect alpha input pins.

nodes.name: alpha_bool_enabled
nodes.description: The boolean value that controls the alpha blending when the alpha input type is set to 'Bool'

nodes.name: child_assets
nodes.description: 自定义子资产引用列表

nodes.name: auto_preview
nodes.description: 是否自动预览生成结果

nodes.name: AnimGraphNode_TwistCorrectiveNode
nodes.description: This is the 'source version' of a bone driven controller, which maps part of the state from one bone to another (e.g., 2 * source.x -> target.z)

nodes.name: thicken_shells
nodes.description: When enabled, regions of the input mesh that have open boundaries (ie "shells") are thickened by extruding them into closed solids. This may be expensive on large meshes.

nodes.name: shell_thickness
nodes.description: Open Shells are Thickened by offsetting vertices along their averaged vertex normals by this amount. Dimension is but clamped to twice the grid cell size.

nodes.name: OnAsyncCaptureSceneComplete
nodes.description: On Async Capture Scene Complete  Delegate Signature

nodes.name: CEEffectorComponent
nodes.description: Class used to define an effector

nodes.name: StreamableSparseVolumeTexture
nodes.description: Represents a streamable SparseVolumeTexture asset and serves as base class for UStaticSparseVolumeTexture and UAnimatedSparseVolumeTexture. It has an array of USparseVolumeTextureFrame.

nodes.name: address_x
nodes.description: The addressing mode to use for the X axis.

nodes.name: address_y
nodes.description: The addressing mode to use for the Y axis.

nodes.name: address_z
nodes.description: The addressing mode to use for the Z axis.

nodes.name: local_ddc_only
nodes.description: If enabled, the SparseVolumeTexture is only going to use the local DDC. For certain assets it might be reasonable to also use the remote DDC, but for larger assets this will mean long up- and download times.

nodes.name: has_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Checks whether or not an instance of the provided AssetUserData class is contained.

nodes.name: get_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Returns an instance of the provided AssetUserData class if it's contained in the target asset.

nodes.name: add_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Creates and adds an instance of the provided AssetUserData class to the target asset.

nodes.name: DisplayClusterWarpGeometryOBJ
nodes.description: 3D geometry that can be used for warping, in an OBJ-like format

nodes.name: normal
nodes.description: Normal of the vertices of the mesh.

nodes.name: uv
nodes.description: UV of the vertices of the mesh.

hyperedges.description: Enums that have been deprecated and renamed
Classes that inherit from StructBase for data structures
Components that inherit from ActorComponent or SceneComponent
Settings classes that inherit from DeveloperSettings
Methods that retrieve or check data
Methods that modify or set data
